title: Stinky
description: A silly little mod I felt like making. adds stuff like: ruby (a new ore), a new kind of weapon, amogus, and more!
body:
a very goofy and silly mod I made with my spare time. includes: herobrine, a new ore, 3 new mobs, a new kind of weapon, cubes of death, and more! (view changelog for more)

Just Enough Items is heavily recemended

Made with mcreator. Just google where to download it or something
